description: Players ranked by finishing order (1st, 2nd, 3rd...). Sum of placements across rounds — lower total placement = better overall rank.

scoring_config.notes: Lower placement number = better. Tie-break: sum of placements across all rounds.

config_notes: No 1v1 matches — all players compete simultaneously in each round
Ranking direction: ASC (lower total placement = better)
Example: race where finishing positions are summed across heats
Suitable for: athletics, swimming heats, race formats
